title: Neufelden
description: We are a building and roleplaying server with a focus on the MTR Minecraft mod.
body:
# Hi, this is MTR NEUFELDEN:

We are a **German** Minecraft MTR server where you can find the following:

> A capital city (Neufelden) with a light rail, commuter rail, and bus lines
Other major cities with many players
Federal states and regions (mountains, sea, countries)
A friendly admin and owner team
Functioning public transport and vehicles

**_And you can be part of it!_**

> We're active in voice and text chat.
There are always players active with whom you can interact.
Joining the build is easy and possible with a short application on our Discord server.

So, what do you say? (:

**_How ​​to join: Come join the Discord server, everything is explained there._**

https://discord.gg/zXrjAnvTXf






Real Time Mod - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/real-time-mod/files/4744468
